title: Reranker Monitoring
summary: Reranker audits can track ranking instability after controlled document perturbations.

sections.heading: Ranking stability
sections.body: Score variance across masked variants can identify brittle relevance decisions.

sections.heading: CI checks
sections.body: Continuous integration can fail a regression when irrelevant masks create large ranking changes.

title: Dashboard Design Notes
summary: Operational dashboards should make repeated workflows easy to scan.
body: Dense tables, filters, and predictable controls help users compare records quickly.
This note is about interface design, not retrieval evaluation or relevance gates.
